[Images](http://chatgpt.com/images/) * [Download](http://chatgpt.com/download/) # Codex for university students Supporting the next generation of builders with $100 in credits for use in Codex. ![Image 2: UI mockup showing Codex in ChatGPT creating a “study group app.” The screen displays a sidebar with threads and tasks, and a main panel describing steps like scaffolding auth, group features, and messaging. A summary shows “Changed 8 files” with additions and deletions, illustrating automated code generation and project setup.](https://images.ctfassets.net/8su2tbn87fck/5dY0fJxMgOvOQyo4rLKVSl/0b83b030c17949bd69205b865326cb60/OG__1_.png?q=90&fm=webp) Students play a critical role in shaping the future of software. Across campuses, they’re using Codex to turn ideas into real systems: course registration agents that simplify enrollment, community platforms, interactive study tools, and prototypes that grow into startups. To support the next generation of builders, we’re offering verified university students in the United States and Canada $100 in credits to use in Codex. [Claim now](https://chatgpt.com/codex/offers/students) By activating this offer, you agree to the [Service Credit Terms⁠](https://openai.com/policies/service-credit-terms/) and eligibility requirements described below. Once verified, credits will be automatically added to your ChatGPT account for use in Codex. ## Frequently asked questions ### Who is eligible for this offer? This offer is available to current students enrolled at degree-granting universities in the United States or Canada and residing in the United States or Canada at the time of claiming the offer. Only one credit offer per student. To claim the offer, your student status and eligibility must be successfully verified. Click the button above to begin the verification process through SheerID. ### Do I need a ChatGPT account? Yes, you need a ChatGPT Free, Go, Plus, or Pro plan to get started. After verification, credits will be applied to your account. The credits can be used to extend Codex usage beyond the limits includ
